testcase.name: verifyLogo

failure.message: ❌ Logo visible nahi hai! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: ❌ Logo visible nahi hai! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) testcase.name: verifySearch

error.message:

...
